Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi AR1 Bus Timings from Al Reem Mall to Marina Mall and Back

January 25, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Public transportation in Abu Dhabi is planned to allow residents and visitors alike to travel seamlessly around the emirate. The AR1 bus route is well covered in this article providing operational timings, important stops and tips to travel is on the bus.

Contents

Operational Details

AR1 bus is running a reliable schedule, so passengers can easily catch the bus as per their convenience. Below is the timetable for Bus AR1 departing from both Al Reem Mall and Marina Mall:

From Al Reem Mall From Marina Mall
06:00 06:50
07:00 07:50
08:00 08:50
09:00 09:50
16:00 16:50
17:00 17:50
18:00 18:50
19:00 19:50

Bus AR1 TimetableYou can also check the official AD Mobility website or this link for AR1 Bus Timings for complete timings.

Ticket Pricing: You can pay for the journey with Hafilat Card where the standard fare is AED 2 for a single zone and AED 5 for two zones and so on. You can recharge the card at kiosks or online.

Route Overview

Some of Abu Dhabi’s major landmarks and services are easily accessible by Bus AR1. Below are the key stops along the route:

  1. Al Reem Mall: Starting point, a major shopping destination.

  2. Marina Square: A bustling area with offices, shops, and dining options.

  3. The Galleria Al Maryah Island: A luxury shopping center.

  4. Sheikh Hazza Bin Sultan Mosque: A beautiful mosque reflecting traditional Islamic architecture.

  5. City Seasons Al Hamra Hotel: A popular hotel offering comfortable stays.

  6. Lifeline Hospital: A well-known healthcare facility.

  7. NMC Specialty Hospital: Another key hospital offering specialized medical services.

  8. Qasr Al Hosn: A historical landmark and cultural heritage site.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  1. Sheraton Khalidiya Hotel: A luxury hotel located in the Khalidiya area.

10.

  1. Sheikha Fatima Park: A beautiful park with recreational facilities.

  2. Corniche: Abu Dhabi’s picturesque waterfront area.

  3. Marina Mall: A premier shopping mall and leisure destination.

  4. Rixos Marina Abu Dhabi: A luxury hotel located near the marina.

  5. Abu Dhabi Energy Center: A major facility in the city’s energy sector.

There are other bus routes in Abu Dhabi which you can check out; the K4 bus route passes through stations from Abu Dhabi Airport ECC to the Ministry of Justice.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Some notable attractions along the AR1 route include:

1.

  1. Qasr Al Hosn: A historical site that offers a glimpse into the heritage of Abu Dhabi.

3.

Journey Experience

A great tour of Abu Dhabi’s key landmarks can be had by taking Bus AR1 between Al Reem Mall and Marina Mall and back. The bus starts at Al Reem Mall, passes through Marina Square, The Galleria on Al Maryah Island and the Sheikh Hazza Bin Sultan Mosque with its Islamic architecture. The stops include City Seasons Al Hamra Hotel, Lifeline, NMC Specialty Hospitals, and Qasr Al Hosn.

It also includes the route to Khalidiya Park, Sheikha Fatima Park, and the Corniche which provides some relaxing green space and some great views onto the waterfront. The trip spans from Marina Mall (a famous mall and leisure site) to a very modern part of the city but also shows a more traditional part. A dynamic mix of cultural sites, green spaces and vibrant urban life is all there for travelers in one journey.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: January 25, 2026.
